calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-17-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Wick, clerk-Beth Wilber, reporter-Brenda Fields, 9;45AM: c/c for court trial, case settled and Ms. Donna Ryu appears for plaintiff and states she has an agreement between plaintiff and defendant and puts the terms on the record as follows:
1. Plaintiff and defendant have a written agreement that will be signed by both parties no later than 2/20/02.
2. Parties stipulate to pay Deanna J. Slavec $75,000.00. Defendant Deja Vu Showgirls
will deliver a check to Hastings Civil Justice Clinic for the total per 1099.
3. Each party to bear their own fees and costs.
4. Terms of the settlement are not confidential.
5. Each side releases the other from all other claims.
6. Each side agrees that the settlement is an enforceable agreement.
The Court advises Ms. Ryu to formalize the agreement as soon as possible.
9:55AM
Court adjourns.
